items.title: Reborn Berrettini one of three Italians into last eight
items.summary: A beaming Matteo Berrettini says tennis is the "love of my life" after reaching a Grand Slam quarter-final for the first time in almost four years.

items.title: Southampton owner will not sack head coach Eckert
items.summary: Southampton owner Dragan Solak says he will not sack Tonda Eckert, despite the "mistake" the head coach made when authorising a spying campaign against rival Championship clubs.
